data.title: Flex Ltd. (FLEX) stock down today despite beating estimates. Q1 earnings: 72 cents/share, sales: $6.575B (estimate: $6.263B). CEO optimistic about FY26.
data.description: Shares of Flex Ltd. (NASDAQ: FLEX) are declining today after the company reported its first-quarter earnings. The company exceeded expectations with adjusted earnings per share coming in at 72 cents, higher than the analyst consensus of 63 cents. Additionally, Flex reported quarterly sales of $6.575 billion, surpassing the Street's estimate of $6.263 billion. Flex's CEO, Revathi Advaithi, stated that these results showcase the company's strong focus on high-growth markets like data centers and power. This marks a positive start to FY26 for Flex. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Avangrid places 80th power generation project in operation; serves 23 states; adds 600 MW from 3 solar projects.
data.description: Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company under the Iberdrola Group, has successfully launched its 80th power generation project in the U.S. This milestone highlights the company's commitment to supplying energy to households and enterprises in 23 states nationwide. In the last half-year alone, Avangrid has unveiled three new solar projects in Texas, Ohio, and California, collectively contributing almost 600 megawatts (MW) to its power generation capacity.

data.title: Northern Trust (NASDAQ: NTRS) beats Q2 earnings with $2.13/share vs $2.01 est. Sales at $1.998B vs $1.955B. Stock up 3.7% to $128.77. Analysts revise price targets.
data.description: Northern Trust Corporation (NASDAQ: NTRS) announced positive second-quarter earnings, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported earnings of $2.13 per share, exceeding the estimated $2.01 per share. Additionally, quarterly sales stood at $1.998 billion, beating the anticipated $1.955 billion. In response, Northern Trust shares increased by 3.7% and were trading at $128.77. Analysts adjusted their price targets for the company, with Keefe, Bruyette & Woods analyst David Konrad reiterating... Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CIQ appoints Peter Nelson, Apple and Claris veteran, as CTO to drive secure software innovation.
data.description: An experienced product and engineering executive has recently partnered with a leading open source organization to enhance secure and high-performance software advancements for the AI era. This collaboration was announced in Reno, Nevada on July 24, 2025. CIQ, the supporting services partner of Rocky Linux, known for its robust performance, is dedicated to driving innovation in the software realm.

data.title: Worldcoin (WLD) rises to $1.18 despite 2M daily token unlocks, supported by bullish MACD signals and strong $0.85 support amid regulatory challenges.
data.description: The cryptocurrency WLD is currently trading at $1.18 per token, despite daily unlocking of 2 million tokens. The token has demonstrated resilience, supported by bullish MACD signals, and maintaining strong support at $0.85. This performance comes in the face of regulatory challenges in the industry.

data.title: Teck Resources announces $0.125 dividend per share for Class A and B shares, to be paid on Sept 29, 2025.
data.description: Teck Resources Limited in Vancouver, British Columbia shared news that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a dividend of $0.125 per share for both Class A common shares and Class B subordinate voting shares. This dividend will be distributed to shareholders on September 29, 2025, for those recorded on September 15, 2025. Teck Resources Limited is listed under TSX as TECK.A and TECK.B, and on NYSE as TECK.
KRUGER PROPOSED AN INVESTMENT OF UP TO $700 MILLION AS PART OF A DIVERSIFICATION STRATEGY AIMED AT ENSURING THE LONG-TERM SUSTAINABILITY OF THE CORNER BROOK PULP AND PAPER OPERATIONS.

data.title: LA Auto Show opens registration for AutoMobility LA 2025, focusing on AI, EVs, and mobility policy. Show returns on Thursday, July 24th in Los Angeles.
data.description: Registration has begun for AutoMobility LA® 2025, the annual media and industry day of Los Angeles Auto Show®. The event, taking place on July 24, 2025, will highlight cutting-edge topics such as AI, electric vehicles (EVs), and mobility policy. Key focuses will include exploring advancements in AI technology and the growing EV market. AutoMobility LA® 2025 aims to gather industry leaders to discuss the future of transportation, with a strong emphasis on sustainability. This event is crucial for those in the automotive sector, with a significant number of attendees expected.

data.title: Inventor from Bronx creates improved carry-all harness MBQ-548 for security professionals to keep hands free while working.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 24, 2025, a security professional from Bronx, N.Y., discussed a new invention that addresses the need for hands-free operations. The inventor highlighted the importance of having a secure method to carry a flashlight while working. Named the "Harness Light," this innovative carry-all harness aims to enhance convenience and efficiency for professionals like security personnel.

data.title: Inventor from Kalamazoo, Mich. develops SHOULDER REDUCER, an orthopedic medical device for shoulder reduction, completes process in seconds.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 24, 2025, an orthopedic technician from Kalamazoo, Michigan shared the creation of the SHOULDER REDUCER. The inventor expressed the motivation behind developing a more effective method for shoulder reduction. The SHOULDER REDUCER innovation drastically cuts down the time needed for the procedure, completing it in seconds compared to previous techniques, marking a significant advancement in orthopedic technology.

data.title: Roc360 closes inaugural $150M Insurance Dedicated Fund for residential credit assets with capital from investors.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Roc360, a prominent company specializing in real estate financing solutions, along with its affiliate investment manager Roc360 Advisors, revealed the successful completion of its first-ever Insurance Dedicated Fund known as "the Fund" or "the IDF." This fund secured a total of $150 million in invested capital from various sources.

data.title: Klotho Neurosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: KLTO) plans to move beyond neurology and pursue technologies to improve longevity indicators.
data.description: Klotho Neurosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: KLTO), a company based in New York, revealed its plans on July 24, 2025, to explore technologies aimed at enhancing muscle strength, bone health, and other factors related to longevity. The company is considering acquiring multiple technologies in this domain.

data.title: U Power Ltd. (Nasdaq: UCAR) priced $1.4M Registered Direct Offering, targeting EV battery-swapping market expansion.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Shanghai, U Power Limited (Nasdaq: UCAR), a company specializing in electric vehicle ("EV") battery-swapping solutions and transitioning into a smart energy grid solutions provider, revealed that they have initiated a new agreement. This development marks an important step for the company as it expands its presence in the electric vehicle market.
FCC Chair Brendan Carr Supports SkyDance's Proposed Changes for Paramount Takeover. He favors ending DEI programs and adding an ombudsman to address CBS News bias.
Democratic FCC Commissioner Anna Gomez Said the Ombudsman Proposal Threatens Press Freedom and Called For a Full Commission Vote on the Merger Instead of Quiet Approval at the Bureau.

data.title: SEI Investments (NASDAQ:SEIC) surpasses Q2 expectations: EPS $1.20 (est. $1.16), sales $559.6M (est. $555.7M). Analysts reduce forecasts post-results.
data.description: SEI Investments Company (NASDAQ: SEIC) exceeded expectations in Q2, announcing earnings of $1.20 per share, surpassing the estimated $1.16 per share. The company also reported quarterly sales of $559.601 million, beating the expected $555.724 million. CEO Ryan Hicke expressed satisfaction with the strong performance, emphasizing strategic investments in talent, technology, and infrastructure to facilitate growth and better serve clients. The company remains focused on enhancing capabilities and scalability.

data.description: Do not disclose, publish, or distribute in any jurisdiction where prohibited.
